item.title: I don't care about upvotes.
item.description: But, at the same time, can we PLEASE spread this around more? She was put in an impossible position and made the best she was able to make of it. Let's do away with the mugshot-looking photo and give her the props she deserves.

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good and bad fools of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online fools
crikkey
mmm hmm
actually today was fine
haven't used an actual physical alarm clock in so long
no thanks
this has happened to me more than i care to admit
takes me back
accurate
nailed it
as is tradition
acceptable
i really don't like spiders but i've also saved like infinity of them
would be better if it was a hat wobble
that's a lot of space weed
just gotta jimmy it in there
and hair
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: I've made a Steampunk Snow White with my own design
item.description:
I did myself this costume from scratch. It began with je design, then I did the costume on my Twitch Channel and even wore it at some conventions.
The design was simpler than the final result. My community inspired me all the bravery to add details x)
For my information My Instagram, where I post my cosplays : https://www.instagram.com/tsukiyo.cosplay/ My Twitch Channel, where I craft, sew and Photoshop : https://www.twitch.tv/tsukiyo_cosplay
item.dc:creator: tsukiiyo

item.title: Donate blood save a life.
item.description: Hello my fellow Imgurians. I’ve been sleeping the past 2 hours but I feel like I’ve slept longer today. I had errands to run while I was out nothing super important then I saw in the parking lot of a store across from where I stopped there was a Medic Blood donation bus. I figured I have nothing special going on and have time I was going to donate blood. I’m no stranger to blood donations and have donated since I was 16. So this was a normal run for me or so I thought. I get on the bus and start answering the questionnaire and showing identification. Well other than they had IPads now this was nothing new. The lady taking my info then excused herself for a minute into this little cubicle sized room for pre donation blood testing. She then comes out and asks me into the room something normal. She closes the door and does the tests and she seemed excited as she went through the tests. And then she looked at me and said I must ask you a favor. There is an immediate need for my blood and if I would possibly do a live donation. I had no clue what that meant and said well I was hoping to always donate while alive. She said there was a person in need at our local hospital that a call out for blood was made at 9:30 am (it was at this time 1:15ish pm). They need a single donor and if I would be able to donate at the hospital with a live transfusion. I now understood why she was so excited and I said that I would do it. She said ok let me get a picture of you to send to our rep at the hospital to enter through the er and tell them I was looking for L their rep. She told me she was wearing a pink shirt with the medic logo. The hospital was a 5 minute drive so I went straight there and met with L. L recognized me as I entered the door and confirmed I was who I said I was. She asked to follow quickly and she was moving quick. She walked me through the halls into the NICU. My heart sank knowing that a baby was so sick it needed blood. A nurse met us and they pulled me into a room and inside was an incubation bed which had all kinds of monitors and wires all connected to this poor innocent child. They had a gourney set up and a tray of stuff to do a blood donation but no bad instead it all went into a machine which there were things on it that kind of reminds me of a 7/11 slush puppy machine which has the clear glass and you can see the thing stir it up. They hooked me up and soon enough they were running the machine. I was for the first five minutes doing paperwork 1 handed but basically HIPPA and releases as per usual. There was a doctor and nurse present the entire time and the gourney was much higher than this little NICU Incubator and I could see the poor baby. He was so so tiny. I could easily say he was so tiny if you measured tip of my finger his feet might reach and inch past my wrist if even that. When I first saw him he had a blue to his skin. The nurse who was watching him noticed me watching and told me about this baby I was trying to save. The baby was born at about 9:00 am today about 2 months premature and had what she said was hypoanemic low blood count. I asked if the baby would need more blood transfusions. The nurse told me that generally his blood count is so low that it can’t do its job right. She told me that unless there was internal bleeding this should be the only time he would need a transfusion. This made me feel better. As did seeing the improvement as I did. The baby’s skin was looking as normal as a premie could be. The whole process took about half an hour. Then after the donation L the rep showed up again and the baby’s father gave permission to give some information but the fact the dad gave permission made by heart break. They couldn’t tell me if she was alive or unconscious etc. I pray she made it. So I hope the baby thrives and survives this ordeal. I for one am tired from the donation. My wife is bringing home some food and we’re going to spend a quiet early night. This was really an experience most donors never find out who their blood goes too. I got to experience my blood saving a life first hand in a poor innocent child. I hope everyone has a good week and if you are old enough please donate blood if you can. It does save lives and blood is needed now more than ever. Thank you all
item.dc:creator: retailmemedrone

item.title: Just some stuff

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Tuesday random meme dump
item.description:
1. STEADY.... HOLLLD... HOLD... HOOOOOOOOOOOOLD... NOW!
2. Truest words have never been spoken
3. He did it again
4. Do you ever wonder what kinda of Kim would have if he was just some random Kim? Will he get laid? We he work at gas station? Will he get beat up for his launch money?
5. The line between madness and genius is thin
6
7. This reminds of some Sci-fi movie or something?
8. Just rolling around
9
10
11
12. Girlfriends mostly run on stolen food and boyfriend hoodies
13
14. Wait, what?!
15. P.S. If you liked the humor of this dump I think you might like my wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game, called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)"! (That button is from the game on the screen) Please wishlist, it would really encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P. S. Have a great week and awesome weekend and don't forget to hydrate and take care of yourself. Go on a hike if the weather is nice : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: The 422nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps -- Kids Are The Future ep 2
item.description:
End Children? I'm in.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
When I was like 6 or something, I was running around a Perkins restaurant and accidentally tripped a busboy with two trays FULL of dirty dishes. I felt so bad. I still think about it.
Do it
Technicalities
We do not.
:sus:
Me IRL
Lame
@CosplayComet
Step 5 must have happened in the late 90's
9/10 Eventually you have to feed it.
Genius
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Children #Kids #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.dc:creator: DigiT00l

item.title: My Twentieth Dump
item.description:
Congratulations! You have been baited into looking at silly pictures on the internet by being lured with this picture of a pretty lady dressed up as Ada Wong!
Also, they really did a number om the servers yesterday, huh. Classic imgur.
Anyway we now return to our regularly scheduled chronological march of memes, starting today at... January 21st 2023!
SO LET'S GOOOOO!!
I do not know what this image is. I do not know why it is in my phone. But now it's on yours too.
Oh! I think actually an imgurian made this as a tribute to Ken Block after he died, and it's VERY good! As usual, I have no sources or names to attribute, but maybe we can look for clues in the comments, gang.
Just an absolute frognanza. Also #8.
HAHAAAAA GOTTEEEEEEM!!
nya :3c
... wow, another frog selector in the same dump? What are the odds? Do you think they're better or worse for getting two cilantro memes in one dump?
Andor was so ducking good.
The bestest of boys.
Russia can go to hell in a handbasket made of broken glass.
Anyway, back to the memes...
Ooh, another fixed point in the timeline! Netflix does a silly oopsie-woopsie.
It is A BIT weird. But I guess he is A BIT rich and handsome.
BEESECHURGER RETURNS! GLORY BE!
1½ stars though...
Every g-dang time. Even in first-person games. Can't risk this character that I will never see looking a bit silly.
See y'all tomorrow!

item.title: The Secondst, Fourth Edition: Oops all Karlach.
item.description:
I haven't actually finished the game. Turns out I'm completely burnt out on DnD.
She has such amazing hair. I wish I had hair like that.
She's so lovable, and a big part of that is because she's genuine to herself.
I want to get strong enough that I can do something like this.
How'd that get in there. Oh well. I've tried to post this 4 times, but imgur was having server issues, as per usual.
Look at these two fluffy idiots. I love them so much.
item.dc:creator: villainousdescent

item.title: i am baffled
item.description: Al Bundy is unhappy despite having it all. That's the whole point of the show. The hot wife he doesn't want to sleep with, the idiot children who are constantly getting away with everything because they are white, pretty, or male, the sexually repressed neighbors who think this constitutes happiness, while clearly being deeply unhappy? and then i read some comments on imgur and i fear people never got it?

item.title: Disney Dump, Episode 2: Attack of the Clones
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TajKmV0mq_c Art by Juan Fernando Garcia - http://elblackbat-juangarcia.tumblr.com/post/94188398172/the-villains-updated-wwwblackbatus
Christina Aguilera - Reflection
Helene Stanley (the model for Cinderella, Aurora in Sleeping Beauty and Anita in 101 Dalmatians) in a rare snapshot
Operation: Dumbo Drop (1995)
Those beignets ain't the only things that are hot and need some sugar Source: https://www.instagram.com/lukaswerneck/?hl=en
98° and Stevie Wonder - True to Your Heart
Bill Thompson (the voice of Mr. Smee) also played his character in live-action.
from TARZAN (1999)
The Xerox process brought a new aspect to hand-drawn animation. Prior to "One Hundred and One Dalmatians", the animators’ drawings had always been transferred to the celluloid sheets by inkers, who would reproduce the lines onto each cel individually. The Xerox process removed the need for this work and transferred the animators’ drawings directly onto the cels. The animators were, unsurprisingly, enthusiastic. For the first time, they would be able to see on-screen the characters and their movements exactly as they drew them. As Disney Legends Frank Thomas and Ollie Johnston explained, “There was very little delicacy in the result, and a light line was apt to drop out entirely, but the animator’s drawing was there—strong and irrevocable in the blackest of lines.” It also saved a lot of time with all those spots the Dalmatians had, it would've taken twice as long to do them for the multitude of puppies the film had without Xerox.
Doctor Who - https://imgur.com/gallery/JxXJqzd Stargate - https://imgur.com/gallery/nXYrraP Star Trek TOS - https://imgur.com/gallery/4SPJxyX TNG - https://imgur.com/gallery/CMgsCIy DS9 - https://imgur.com/gallery/S8ISUlZ VOY - https://imgur.com/gallery/YDc2PD2 ENT - https://imgur.com/gallery/ov74iIE 09 - https://imgur.com/gallery/Odj24Cz Xena - https://imgur.com/gallery/Hws7HQl Sesame Street - https://imgur.com/gallery/f3RafRD Black Lagoon - https://imgur.com/gallery/EraNuoW The Great Race - https://imgur.com/gallery/tO9DeWn Mary Poppins - https://imgur.com/gallery/f6WgNlR Chip 'n Dale - https://imgur.com/gallery/L6uxizO
Directed by John Musker and Ron Clements (their first film as duel directors, together they would later make such films as: Little Mermaid, Aladdin, Hercules, Treasure Planet, Princess and the Frog and Moana). https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s-v9FiDKyaA Starring Vincent Price, who considered the role of Ratigan one of his all time favorites: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=20krcN-iXBo The first Disney animated film to utilize CGI effects, for its climactic showdown inside the Big Ben clocktower. It also caused quite a bit of controversy within the company, after Michael Eisner decided to change the film's name at the last minute to sound "less British". BASIL OF BAKER STREET became the generic GREAT MOUSE DETECTIVE. The animators mocked him in a joke memo that pissed off Eisner and the execs, after leaked to the press (and later became a category on Jeopardy): https://i.redd.it/6f0s8oi5l1o61.jpg
Source: https://www.reddit.com/r/DIY/comments/18tx4lb/my_first_attempt_at_a_wacky_furniture_piece/
It's a natural occurrence https://i.imgur.com/OgwiD4q.jpeg But a certain unverifiable TikTok video has been making the rounds here and on Reddit, of some random lady claiming there's "heavy contamination in the water". By throwing a rock into a creek (that can't even be confirmed as being in Ohio let alone East Palestine) and disturbing the water... intentional misinformation for clicks. This has been removed repeatedly from Reddit because nothing in the vid can verified, people are just taking it at face value and believing the title alone. There has been a rampant spread of misleading vids and pics like this ever since the derailment, intentionally trying to make the disaster appear worse than it actually is. Spinning it into conspiracy bullshit and making up stuff like this for clicks/views. And it's time somebody put a stop to it, because the spill is already bad enough without people intentionally making up shit about it. It's just making it harder for the EPA to do their job and clean this shit up.
An incredible mashup created by Lindsay McCutcheon https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E-6xk4W6N20
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel
